positive: A stylized, maximalist silhouette composition featuring interconnected botanical elements—giant fern fronds, abstract palm leaves, and glowing celestial bodies like moons and stars. The style must be inspired by Art Nouveau and modern linework, using thick, clean lines and high-contrast black ink on a solid, creamy off-white background. Focus on a central, symmetrical arrangement suitable for a chest print. Composition should emphasize negative space and geometric symmetry. Palette direction: deep emerald green, muted gold, and stark black lines. Ultra-detailed, vector graphic quality, crisp edges, perfectly flat lay, commercial print design.
